rules: Use Accent Alert (Terracotta) for Lost Pet status and primary action CTAs.
Never use pure black or pure white without purpose; surfaces are pure white #FFF for contrast against the warm #FDFBF7 background.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-extrabold
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold

rules: Avoid Inter, Roboto, and default sans-serifs.
Headlines must be tight and sturdy (tracking-tight).
Body copy must use IBM Plex Sans for a highly legible, legal/registry aesthetic.

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24)

grid_patterns.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 (Sidebar col-span-3, Main col-span-9)
grid_patterns.forms: Max width 2xl, single column with grouped sections.

rules: Optical alignment: ensure text and icons align vertically.
Map element (Leaflet) must have clear borders and take prominent space in recovery flows.

cards.style: Flat, crisp, civic utility feel. Avoid heavy floating shadows.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E3F32] text-white rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#162D24] transition-colors
buttons.alert: bg-[#C85A40] text-white rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#B04D35] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1E3F32] border border-[#E2E8E4] rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#FDFBF7] transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-[#5F736A] hover:text-[#1C2421] hover:bg-[#E5EBE8] px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors

forms.inputs: bg-white border border-[#E2E8E4] rounded-md px-4 py-2.5 text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#8CB3A1] focus:border-transparent outline-none
forms.pattern: Group related fields in visual blocks. Use clear, accessible error states.

badges.lost: bg-[#FDF2F0] text-[#C85A40] border border-[#FADCD5] rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold
badges.found: bg-[#F0F5F2] text-[#3B6954] border border-[#D5E6DD] rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold
badges.registered: bg-[#F3F4F6] text-[#4B5563] border border-[#E5E7EB] rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold

hero_emotional.description: Woman hugging dog, conveying deep connection and trust. Use for landing page hero.
A woman lovingly embraces her dog outdoors, representing companionship.

pet_placeholders.description: Brown dog near boulder. Use for 'Lost Pet' dummy data card.
Shaggy dog looking up. Use for registered pet profile.
Black and white portrait of a fluffy dog.

veterinary_context.description: Veterinarian carefully examining a fluffy cat. Use for Vet/Rescue portal or About Us section.
Veterinarian examining a white kitten. Use for professional trust signals.

rules: NEVER use placeholder services (via.placeholder.com). Use ONLY these provided URLs for dummy data.
Max hero image overlay opacity bg-black/30 or bg-white/30 to ensure text legibility while keeping image vivid.

motion.hover: Fast transitions (duration-150 ease-out) for buttons and inputs.
motion.page_load: Subtle fade-in (opacity 0 to 1) for main content to feel robust and un-fussy.
motion.alerts: Gentle slide-in for toast notifications. Do not bounce or wobble.

testing.data_testid: MANDATORY: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., 'login-submit-button', 'pet-card-321', 'report-lost-btn').

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio. The accent alert (#C85A40) on white is >4.5:1.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have clear focus rings.
accessibility.aria: Use aria-labels on icon-only buttons (like map controls).
